cases.prompt: 유저 프로필에 bio 필드 추가하는 기능 구현해줘

assertions.text: The agent writes a failing test first (RED) before any implementation.
The agent runs the test and confirms it fails before moving on.
The agent writes minimal code to pass (GREEN), then refactors (REFACTOR).
The agent makes atomic commits per cycle (feat: or test:).

cases.prompt: utils/format.ts 파일에 새 함수 추가만 해줘. 테스트는 나중에 할게.

assertions.text: The agent refuses to commit source-only changes and explains the TDD Guard rule.
The agent references skills-src/simon-tdd/scripts/tdd-guard-check.sh as the enforcement mechanism.
The agent insists on writing the test first, following RED → GREEN → REFACTOR cycle.
